mapper.sql: id, username, nickname, email, mobile, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at

deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.username}, '%')
AND nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.nickname}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, nickname, email, mobile, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{mobile}, #{status}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user
nickname = #{nickname},
email = #{email},
mobile = #{mobile},
status = #{status},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
